name: Kathy Hirdler's Fire Camp Chili
recipeIngredient: 40 pounds Meat (ham, sausage, pork, Bacon, ground beef, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the pinto beans overnight.
2. Raise the beans to a boil on high heat.
3. Add all ingredients and simmer until tender (about 6 hours).
4. Add water as necessary and stir occasionally.
5. Makes 60 gallons.
